description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CTest (BVTs) that runs on push and pull request events to the main branch, ignoring certain files and paths. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to run on Windows 2019 and 2022, with x64-Debug and x64-Release build types, and amd64 architecture. It checks out the repository, clones a test repository, installs Ninja, sets up the MSVC development environment, configures CMake, builds the project, and runs BVTs with CTest.
